groupings.title: Start Here
groupings.description: Entry points and daily workflows for choosing the right Laravel skill before changing code.

groupings.title: Architecture
groupings.description: Laravel-native boundaries for controllers, routes, services, helpers, and design patterns.

groupings.title: HTTP & Security
groupings.description: Request validation, API evolution, authorization, rate limiting, CSRF, and security checks.

groupings.title: Data & Eloquent
groupings.description: Migrations, relationships, query shape, transactions, consistency, and large dataset handling.

groupings.title: Performance
groupings.description: Database optimization, caching, eager loading, and selective column patterns.

groupings.title: UI & Admin
groupings.description: Blade, Livewire, Nova, and translation patterns for Laravel user interfaces.

groupings.title: Ops & Integrations
groupings.description: Queues, Horizon, schedules, filesystems, HTTP clients, logging, and storage configuration.

groupings.title: Quality
groupings.description: Testing, Pint, E2E checks, controller coverage, documentation, and dependency trimming.

groupings.title: Modern Laravel
groupings.description: Laravel 13+ topics including the AI SDK, vector search, PHP attributes, and upgrade planning.

groupings.title: Prompting
groupings.description: Prompt structure, debugging context, code review requests, examples, iteration, and standards extraction.
